name: postgres
description: Protects PostgreSQL databases from destructive AI operations

smartRules.name: shield:postgres:block-drop-table
smartRules.reason: DROP TABLE is irreversible — blocked by Postgres shield

smartRules.name: shield:postgres:block-truncate
smartRules.reason: TRUNCATE is irreversible — blocked by Postgres shield

smartRules.name: shield:postgres:block-drop-column
smartRules.reason: DROP COLUMN is irreversible — blocked by Postgres shield

smartRules.name: shield:postgres:review-grant-revoke
smartRules.reason: Permission changes require human approval (Postgres shield)
